{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Embrace of the Titan
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Embrace of the Titan]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] mastered by [[Maraan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
